import { useMatch } from "./useMatch.js"; function useParams(opts) { return useMatch({ from: opts.from, shouldThrow: opts.shouldThrow, structuralSharing: opts.structuralSharing, strict: opts.strict, select: (match) => { const params = opts.strict === false ? match.params : match._strictParams; return opts.select ? opts.select(params) : params; } }); } export { useParams }; //# sourceMappingURL=useParams.js.map
